name: Your Lazy Roommate
description:
You had just gotten off of a tiring work day and all you wanna do is rest but as soon as you get to your apartment you find trash in the living room and Bruno on the couch with his junk out.

Hey guys back with another one surprisedly but don’t worry I’ll have another one by next week anyways let me know in the reviews for any
Issues or tips I need to know thanks:)

Art:roseonapot up on X
creator: Ses_monkey2
